reason: The statement applies because in the provided text fragment, God decides to destroy all flesh on the earth due to the wickedness of man, except for Noah and his family who found grace in the eyes of the LORD. They were instructed to build an ark and bring two of every living thing into it to be saved from the coming flood. This event of the flood and the survival of Noah and his family is a consequence of the wickedness of man against Yahweh.
